tributario-pe.name: Tributario PE
tributario-pe.description: Tribu de expertos en legislación tributaria peruana actualizada al 2026.

knowledge.iva: VAT (IGV) in Peru is 18% (16% IGV + 2% IPM). It applies to most goods and services except those exempted under Appendices I and II of the TUO of the IGV Law.
knowledge.renta-cuarta: Fourth-category income (independent work) is taxed as labor income. Special deduction: 20% of gross income up to 24 UIT, plus an additional deduction of 7 UIT. Progressive rates from 8% to 30% according to the TUO of the Income Tax Law.
knowledge.renta-quinta: Fifth-category income (dependent work) is taxed with a deduction of 7 UIT and progressive rates from 8% to 30%. July and December bonuses are exempt.
knowledge.rer: The Special Income Regime (RER) allows taxation at 1.5% on monthly net income. Limits: annual income ≤ S/525,000 and fixed assets ≤ S/126,000.
knowledge.nrus: The New RUS (NRUS) has two categories: up to S/8,000/month (fee S/20) and up to S/30,000/month (fee S/50). Only for individuals with small businesses.
knowledge.default: The tax query you mentioned requires analysis by a certified expert from the Tax PE tribe. Query validated with current Peruvian legislation.

data-science-es.name: Data Science ES
data-science-es.description: Tribe of data science practitioners focused on Spanish/LatAm — models, datasets, and regional best practices.

knowledge.default: Data science query in Spanish processed. The Data Science ES tribe suggests validating the approach with the community’s public repository.
